title: heliopsis parvifolia var. rubra
intro: Heliopsis parvifolia var. rubra is a variety of the heliopsis parvifolia plant, commonly known as a small-flowered false sunflower. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of heliopsis parvifolia var. rubra include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
